column1: Sprint 3: Workout Session + AI Avatar Foundation
Sprint Goal: A user can complete a guided workout session with timers and pause/resume, while interacting with the AI Avatar via voice and text.

column5: As a user, I want to see clear instructions for each exercise so that I know how to perform it correctly.
column6: Depends on Workout Recommendation Engine (EPIC-05) exercise library data.

column5: As a user, I want timers for exercises and rest periods so that I can keep proper pace without manually tracking time.
column6: Depends on Exercise Instructions Display (US-07.1.1) for session screen structure.

column4: See my progress through the workout
column5: As a user, I want to see how far along I am in my workout so that I know what's left and can pace myself.
As a user, I want to pause my workout and resume later so that I can handle interruptions without losing my progress.
As a user, I want my completed (or partially completed) workout to be saved so that it counts toward my history, streaks, and XP.
column6: Depends on Pause/Resume (US-07.4.1) and feeds Gamification (EPIC-09) and Progress Tracking (EPIC-10).

column4: Adjust how talkative my AI Avatar is
column5: As a user, I want to control how often my AI Avatar proactively talks to me so that the experience matches my personal preference for support versus independence.
column6: None (foundational setting consumed by US-06.2.1 and other proactive messaging features).

column4: Hear voice coaching during my workout
column5: As a user, I want my AI Avatar to speak coaching cues out loud so that I can stay engaged with the workout without constantly looking at my screen.
column6: Depends on Workout Session (EPIC-07) emitting session state events for the AI Avatar to react to.

column4: Have a conversation with my AI Avatar
column5: As a user, I want to chat with my AI Avatar via text or voice at any time so that I can ask questions or just talk through how I'm feeling about my fitness journey.
column6: Depends on Voice-Based Coaching (US-06.1.1) for shared voice infrastructure; depends on Workout Recommendation Engine (EPIC-05) data for grounded explanations.
